organization.name: Lupine Science
organization.description: Lupine Science studies where interatomic potentials fail, why those failures have structure, and how that structure can guide correction.
organization.oneLine: Lupine Science is a public research program for the error geometry of interatomic potentials.

surfaces.name: Lupine Science
surfaces.role: research program and public start page
surfaces.description: Lab-facing orientation to the scientific question, evidence status, LUPI routes, Library, live lab, and ways to extend the work.

surfaces.name: LUPI
surfaces.description: WebGPU viewer for atomistic evidence, molecular trajectories, gallery datasets, and publication-quality inspection.

surfaces.name: Lupine Library
surfaces.description: Mobile-first research reader for reports, notes, evidence, status labels, and the public changelog.

surfaces.name: glim-think
surfaces.description: Durable agent loop for hypotheses, evidence, claims, broadcasts, and research-ledger operations.

narrative.problem: Interatomic potentials are necessary and wrong in structured ways.
narrative.discovery: Across many potentials and materials, prediction errors form low-dimensional geometry rather than random scatter.
narrative.system: Lupine Science measures that geometry, tests it, publishes corrections, and keeps the claim lifecycle visible.
narrative.viewer: LUPI lets humans and agents inspect the evidence in the browser.
narrative.library: The Lupine Library turns the work into durable, searchable human knowledge.
narrative.agents: glim-think keeps hypotheses, evidence, refutations, corrections, and broadcasts attached to a ledger.
narrative.observerPosture: Investors and other observers should watch the public evidence trail rather than expect a pitch-first front door.

marketStrategy.positioning: Lupine Science is a lab-facing research corpus and evidence system for atomistic model trust.
marketStrategy.winningThesis: Own the trust question for interatomic potentials: what does this model get wrong, is the wrongness structured, can the evidence be inspected, and what correction target follows?
primaryWedges: Evidence Pack for a paper, dataset, or benchmark
Potential Trust Report for a material family
Ledger-backed research loop for model evaluation

citation.preferredSentence: Lupine Science studies the error geometry of interatomic potentials; LUPI is the browser-native viewer for inspectable evidence, and Lupine Library is the public research corpus.

publication.title: The Causal Geometry of Prediction Errors in Interatomic Potentials
publication.note: Single source of truth for the paper's public status. The paper is an unpublished work-in-progress draft; do not describe it as published, submitted, reviewed, accepted, or assigned to any journal or venue. Public surfaces must derive status from this field.

founder.name: Alex Welcing
founder.note: Single source of truth for team facts. There is ONE founder and no other team to mention. Do not present multiple people, a team, or advisors in public materials.
